docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 390373 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN GENERAL FINANCE INC FDBA MORRIS PLAN CO AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES LESLIE M

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN GENERAL FINANCE INC FDBA MORRIS PLAN CO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNES LESLIE M $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $744.04 INTEREST, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,507.04, JUDGEMENT DATED SEPT. 30, 1981. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
